title: Bridge Essay: Temporal dynamics of the Rubber Hand Illusion.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Birth/Body** (Phase 1) with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Links Birth/Body to mechanistic neuroscience through Temporal, dynamics, of, the, Rubber.

**Temporal dynamics of the Rubber Hand Illusion.** — Sci Rep. PMID: 37160924. DOI: 10.1038/s41598-023-33747-2. It is widely accepted that the representation of the body is not fixed and immutable, but rather flexible and constantly updated based on acontinuous stream of multisensory information. This mechanism can be very useful to adapt to several situations, but it would not be adaptive if the body representation was too malleable or if it wasn'tcapable of restoring its integrity after atransient modification.
